webpage_section.section_description: Text content area of the first card, containing a heading, description paragraph, and a CTA button on an orange background

difference_1.element_description: Card text content container with heading, body text, and CTA button
difference_1.computed_style_change: background-color differs (orange vs light blue); padding-top: 20px vs 0px; padding-bottom: 20px vs 32px
difference_1.difference: The original card has a warm orange/peach background color, while the migrated version has a light blue background. The text content is entirely different (original: 'Celebrating 75 Years of Saga' with subscription offer; migrated: 'Saga Health Insurance' with policy offer). The top padding is missing in the migrated version (0px vs 20px).

difference_2.computed_style_change: padding-top: 20px vs 0px; padding-bottom: 20px vs 32px; padding-left/right: 20px vs 24px
difference_2.difference: The padding around the text content differs: the original has uniform 20px padding on all sides, while the migrated has no top padding (0px), 32px bottom padding, and 24px horizontal padding. This causes the text to sit flush against the top of the content area in the migrated version.
